translation: I have been sent and the Hour is like these two (holding up index and middle fingers together).

scholarComments.comment: Illustrates that no other prophet will come between Prophet Muhammad ﷺ and Qiyamah.

explanation: The Prophet ﷺ compared his advent to the proximity of the index and middle fingers.

arabic: مَا بَيْنَ خَلْقِ آدَمَ إِلَى قِيَامِ السَّاعَةِ خَلْقٌ أَكْبَرُ مِنَ الدَّجَّالِ
translation: There is no creation between the creation of Adam and the onset of the Hour greater than Dajjal.

scholarComments.comment: Refers to the magnitude of trial, illusion, and deception associated with Dajjal.

explanation: Highlights the supreme spiritual trial represented by Al-Masih ad-Dajjal.

arabic: لَيَكُونَنَّ مِنْ أُمَّتِي أَقْوَامٌ يَسْتَحِلُّونَ الْحِرَ وَالْحَرِيرَ وَالْخَمْرَ وَالْمَعَازِفَ
translation: There will be people among my Ummah who will consider permissible adultery, silk for men, intoxicants, and musical instruments...

scholarComments.comment: Emphasizes the moral hazard of attempting to make forbidden matters permissible under new labels.

explanation: Prophecy warning against societal normalization of prohibited acts.

arabic: لا تقوم الساعة حتى يتقارب الزمان فتكون السنة كالشهور والشهر كالجمعة
translation: The Hour will not be established until time passes rapidly, such that a year is like a month and a month like a week...

scholarComments.comment: Graded Sahih in Silsilat al-Ahadith as-Sahihah #1841.

explanation: Foretells both loss of spiritual blessing in time and modern speed of communications.

arabic: وَأَنْ تَرَى الْحُفَاةَ الْعُرَاةَ الْعَالَةَ رِعَاءَ الشَّاءِ يَتَطَاوَلُونَ فِي الْبُنْيَانِ
translation: And when you see the barefoot, naked, destitute shepherds competing in constructing lofty buildings...

scholarComments.comment: Key indicator in Hadith Jibril regarding socio-economic transformation in Arabia.

explanation: Famous portion of Hadith Jibril detailing minor signs of Qiyamah.

arabic: لا تقوم الساعة حتى تعود أرض العرب مروجاً وأنهاراً
translation: The Hour will not be established until the land of Arabia returns to meadows and rivers.

scholarComments.comment: Indicates geological revertment of Arabia to lush greenery.

explanation: Environmental transformation of the Arabian desert prior to Qiyamah.

arabic: الْمَهْدِيُّ مِنِّي، جَلِيُّ الْجَبْهَةِ، أَقْنَى الأَنْفِ، يَمْلأُ الأَرْضَ قِسْطًا وَعَدْلاً
translation: The Mahdi is from me, with a broad forehead and hooked nose. He will fill the earth with fairness and justice...

scholarComments.comment: Graded Sahih in Sahih Sunan Abi Dawud.

explanation: Physical description and mission of Imam Al-Mahdi.

arabic: وَالَّذِي نَفْسِي بِيَدِهِ لَيُوشِكَنَّ أَنْ يَنْزِلَ فِيكُمُ ابْنُ مَرْيَمَ حَكَمًا عَدْلاً
translation: By Him in Whose Hand is my soul, the son of Maryam will soon descend among you as a just ruler...

scholarComments.comment: Affirms the physical descent of Jesus (AS) before Qiyamah.

explanation: Details the return of Prophet Isa (AS) and his ruling with Islamic law.

arabic: إنها لن تقوم حتى ترون قبلها عشر آيات: الدخان، والدجال، والدابة، وطلوع الشمس من مغربها...
translation: The Hour will not come until you see ten signs before it: The Smoke, Dajjal, The Beast, Sun rising from West...

scholarComments.comment: Master hadith enumerating the 10 Major Signs of Qiyamah.

explanation: Canonical listing of all ten major eschatological events.

arabic: لم تظهر الفاحشة في قوم قط حتى يعلنوا بها إلا فشا فيهم الطاعون والأوجاع...
translation: Immorality does not become widespread in a people until they announce it openly, except that plagues and new diseases spread among them...

scholarComments.comment: Links public moral decay to health and ecological crises.

explanation: Warns of novel epidemics resulting from open public immorality.
